title: Dev Agent Output Schema
description: Structured output produced by the Dev Agent after implementing a coding task within approved scope.

task_summary.description: A concise human-readable description of the task that was implemented, what was changed, and the outcome. Should be sufficient for a reviewer to understand the scope of changes without reading every file diff.

files_modified.description: Complete list of files that were created, modified, or deleted during task execution.

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the file.

operation.description: The type of change applied to this file.

description.description: A brief summary of what changed in this file and why.

lines_changed.description: Approximate number of lines changed (optional but recommended for large files).

tests_written.description: List of test files or test cases written as part of this task. If no tests were written, this array should be empty with a note captured in assumptions.

coverage_description.description: What scenarios, edge cases, or code paths this test covers.

assumptions.description: All assumptions made during implementation that reviewers or subsequent agents should be aware of. Includes any scope boundaries that were inferred rather than explicitly stated.

risks.description: Risks or concerns identified during implementation. These do not necessarily block delivery but should be tracked and addressed before production deployment.

description.description: Description of the risk or concern.

recommendation.description: Recommended action to address or mitigate this risk.

verification_steps.description: Ordered list of steps that must be executed to verify the implementation is correct. These steps should be concrete and runnable by an automated verification agent or human reviewer.

step_id.description: Short unique identifier for this verification step (e.g., 'verify-1').

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step verifies.

command_or_check.description: The command to run, assertion to evaluate, or check to perform.

expected_result.description: The expected outcome of this step if the implementation is correct.

rollback_instructions.description: Instructions for safely reverting all changes made during this task if verification fails or if the changes need to be undone.

summary.description: A brief description of what rollback involves and any important caveats.

step_id.description: Short unique identifier for this rollback step.

command_or_action.description: The command to run or manual action to take.
